principle: The viewer is rebuilt around an imagegen-generated raster asset sheet. Legacy SVG assembly and dynamic playback are no longer the default delivery surface.

artDirection.scene: bright white vertical long-table expert meeting room
artDirection.characters: five reusable black cow silhouette expert base bodies with clear white/gray separation
artDirection.personaRule: Persona differences use external labels, small accessories, tiny low-saturation badges, and role props only.
forbidden: single finished scene with characters baked into the room
low-contrast gray-white bodies that lose silhouette readability
large colored torso bars or high-saturation body fills
one unique body model per expert persona
claiming placeholder SVG assets as final bitmap art

runtimePreview.purpose: Default first-screen raster asset sheet for five black cow body models, three seated directions, white table, and white chair direction assets.

extractedRuntimeAssets.cropPolicy: cyan-key source sheet; remove only cyan background/edge spill to alpha, preserve white table and chair pixels
extractedRuntimeAssets.runtimeAssembly: index.html renders the meeting stage directly from extracted PNG slices.

outputs.requirements: Empty white meeting room, doorway visible, no table, no chairs, no characters, no text.
Transparent vertical long conference table, matte white, clear left/right/bottom edges.
Transparent left table edge mask for seated cow occlusion.
Transparent right table edge mask for seated cow occlusion.
Transparent near table edge mask for lower-depth seating.
Left-side white chair back, facing right, transparent background.
Left-side white chair front occluder, transparent background.
Right-side white chair back, facing left, transparent background.
Right-side white chair front occluder, transparent background.
Host white chair back, facing down, transparent background.
Host white chair front occluder, transparent background.

assetBatches.name: five-body-seed-frames
assetBatches.requirements: Approved seated seed frame for each body: strong black cow silhouette, readable white/gray facial or horn separation, no large colored body bar, bottom-center anchor.

assetBatches.name: walk-strips
assetBatches.requirements: Generate each full strip in one pass from approved seed; no independent frame generation.

assetBatches.name: seated-action-strips
assetBatches.requirements: Same body, same scale, same bottom-center anchor, transparent or chroma-key background.

outputs.requirements: Glasses, headset, pen, cap, chart, shield, notebook, and small role props only; no full characters.
External nameplate shapes and tiny accent markers, no baked role text.
Optional polished speaker-card panel background, no text.
Reference strip for challenge line dots/glow; can stay CSS if audit approves.

qualityGates: First-screen preview uses the imagegen-generated raster asset sheet, not SVG placeholders or runtime-scattered composition.
Asset sheet visually resembles a production source board, not a finished webpage screenshot.
Black cow silhouette remains readable against the white office furniture.
Every P0 asset can be replaced independently without changing session JSON.
Five body models are enough for all expert personas.
Sprite strips keep stable scale, silhouette, and bottom-center anchor.
Runtime viewer must label SVG assets as source or placeholder assets until bitmap files exist.
